description: Mark Greenberg from Kraken discusses the challenges of trading equities and introduces X Stocks, a new platform for permissionless self-custody of tokenized equities, in partnership with Bakkt. The initiative aims to provide 24/7 access to various asset classes on-chain, enhancing usability and accessibility for users globally.
topic_summary: At [t=5:44], Mark Greenberg introduces himself and highlights the difficulties of trading equities. He emphasizes Kraken's mission to integrate crypto with all asset classes, leading to the announcement of X Stocks at [t=78:49]. David from Bakkt elaborates on the platform's features, including tokenization of popular US stocks and the importance of a decentralized finance (DeFi) stack for usability at [t=185:87].
